steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The definitive clue is the historians' claim: “They see pachuca style as a form of rebellion… showed a desire for self-expression and freedom.” This directly states that historians associate the style with resistance to social norms and self-expression.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice B aligns precisely with the historians’ emphasis on rebellion and expressing freedom. A, C, and D either add unsupported claims (A: “popular trend”; C: “support for the United States”; D: “similar to other trends”) or reverse the text’s meaning. That matches choice B — B is correct.
